scripts.format: oxfmt app content .vscode content.config.ts eslint.config.mjs nuxt.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json unocss.config.ts vercel.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check app content .vscode content.config.ts eslint.config.mjs nuxt.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json unocss.config.ts vercel.json
scripts.lint: node node_modules/eslint/bin/eslint.js app content.config.ts eslint.config.mjs nuxt.config.ts unocss.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: node node_modules/eslint/bin/eslint.js app content.config.ts eslint.config.mjs nuxt.config.ts unocss.config.ts --fix
